title: Zizzle Zing Zoom
poem_text:
Zizzle zing the flim flop light,
Bizzle bop the sparkle bright.
Tizzle top the whirligig,
Fizzle pop the jiggly wig.
Dizzle dash the snickety snap,
Wizzle wham the clippety clap.
Now the zizzle starts to slow,
Dreamy drowsy, off you go.
cover_context: A swirling galaxy of glowing, bouncing blobs of light and color, like fireflies made of jelly, dancing in a dark room.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, piano and light brush drums, 111 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
